series_metadata.series_description: Completive scholarships awarded to graduating seniors lo be used for undergraduate studies to recognize exceptionally able high school seniors who show promise of continued excellence in post secondary education.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the Auditor of the Federal Government; then the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred
